## Validation

- [ ] `python -m pytest`
- [ ] `python -m compileall -q src tests scripts`
- [ ] `python scripts/verify_publish_tree.py`
- [ ] Documentation links and rendered HTML checked when applicable

## Provenance and safety

- [ ] Third-party sources and licenses are recorded in `docs/THIRD_PARTY_MANIFEST.json`.
- [ ] No credentials, personal research data, generated binaries, or runtime environments are included.
- [ ] Scientific claims and citations remain subject to human review.
